data.body:
368c PRE-FLIGHT + PUSHED. make test: 5888 passed, 1 failed — the failure (test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module) is a PRE-EXISTING env artifact (in-repo .venv makes yaml classify repo-local not third-party); CONFIRMED identical failure on clean origin/main main checkout, unrelated to opcert (git diff origin/main empty for that test + grounding tool). All 12 opcert tests green.
COMMITTED 26f477f73 (garlicky-deviant-kakapo) with rebar-ticket + DCO Signed-off-by Joe Oakhart + Change-Id; pre-commit lint+typecheck passed. PUSHED to gerrit refs/for/main -> CHANGE 649 https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/649 [base of stack]. Awaiting Verified +1 + LLM-Review +1 before closing 368c (per CLAUDE.local.md).
NEXT: build 42d1 (config+policy) on top of 368c while 649 CI runs; kicking off 42d1 plan-review.
